title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and databases in one comprehensive course.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Design beautiful, user-centred interfaces using Figma. Covers design systems, prototyping, and usability research methods.

title: Python for Data Science & ML
description: Dive deep into data analysis, visualisation, and machine learning using Python, pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn.

title: Digital Marketing Strategy
description: Build high-converting marketing funnels. Learn SEO, paid ads, email campaigns, and social media growth tactics.

title: Ethical Hacking & Cybersecurity
description: Learn penetration testing, network security, and vulnerability assessment. Prepare for CEH and CompTIA Security+ exams.

title: iOS & Android App Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps with React Native. Publish to both the App Store and Google Play from a single codebase.
